# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

We are committed to making participation in this project a respectful and productive experience for everyone, regardless of background or experience level.

## Our Standards

**Expected behaviour:**
- Be respectful and constructive in code review and issue discussions.
- Assume good intent; ask for clarification before assuming malice.
- Focus feedback on code and ideas, not on people.
- Accept architectural decisions made for cross-product consistency.

**Unacceptable behaviour:**
- Personal attacks, insults, or derogatory comments.
- Harassment of any kind.
- Sharing others' private information without consent.

## Scope

This code of conduct applies within all project spaces — pull requests, issues, commit messages, and any related communication channels.

## Enforcement

Instances of unacceptable behaviour may be reported to the project maintainers. All reports will be reviewed and investigated promptly and confidentially.

Maintainers have the right and responsibility to remove, edit, or reject contributions that do not align with this code of conduct.
